ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skaters" (
  "skater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skater */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the skater */,
  "nation" TEXT /* Nation the skater represents */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the skater */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the skater belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the skater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the skater is currently active */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the skater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skaters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the figure skating team */,
  "nation" TEXT /* Nation the team represents */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the leader of the team */,
  "team_member_ids" TEXT /* List of member IDs in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the competition is held */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "event_year" INTEGER /* Year when the competition took place */,
  "competition_level" TEXT /* Level of the competition (e.g., Junior, Senior) */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organizer of the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "skater_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skater performing */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition where the performance took place */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment of the performance (e.g., Short Program, Free Skating) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the skater in their performance */,
  "team_points" INTEGER /* Points contributed to the team score */,
  "segment_position" INTEGER /* Position of the skater in the segment */,
  "technical_score" REAL /* Technical score achieved by the skater */,
  "program_component_score" REAL /* Program component score achieved by the skater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_skater_id FOREIGN KEY ("skater_id") REFERENCES skaters ("skater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition */,
  "skater_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skater */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank achieved by the skater in the competition */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points scored by the skater */,
  "total_segment_score" REAL /* Total segment score achieved by the skater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_skater_id FOREIGN KEY ("skater_id") REFERENCES skaters ("skater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Country the judge represents */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the judge was certified */,
  "judging_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the judge (e.g., Technical, Artistic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judging_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judging score entry */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance being judged */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the judge giving the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Score awarded by the judge */,
  "score_for" TEXT /* Whether the score is for Technical Elements (TE) or Program Components (PC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judging_scores_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judging_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Individual, Team) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_results" (
  "team_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team result entry */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank achieved by the team in the competition */,
  "team_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "team_total_score" REAL /* Total score achieved by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedule" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event scheduled */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Upcoming, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedule_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedule_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition related to the log */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was made */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., Update, Change, Announcement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_logs_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)
